_comment: Pinned OSDU PDM v1.0 subset used by the generator (ADR 0010). Column names are verbatim from the OSDU PDM Data Dictionary (Apache-2.0). Each table entry: canonical OSDU table name, the exact columns (name + coarse type) this generator populates, and the enumerated reference-data values it emits. Both src/oag_generator/schema.py and tests/test_conformance.py are checked against this file, so emitted Parquet cannot silently drift in name, type, or reference value.
_reference_value_casing: OSDU reference-data values are seed data whose casing is not standardized across R_ tables (the dictionary shows e.g. 'Forecast', 'DAY', 'measured', 'OIL'). We deliberately normalize the values we emit to Title Case and pin them here as the authoritative set.
_types: int -> pa.int64, string -> pa.string, float -> pa.float64

down_time_event._note: EVENT_CATEGORY carries the downtime cause (the R_EVENT_CATEGORY value column); it is user-extensible reference data in OSDU, so its values are NOT pinned here. DURATION_HOURS is per-value hours (an implicit UOM, per ADR 0017). Nullable audit/subcategory/id columns from the dictionary are omitted (ADR 0017).

well_test._note: OSDU PDM WELL_TEST (the PPDM-3.9 WELL_TEST family the OSDU PDM inherits -- PPDM is lineage only, ADR 0010); keyed to the WELL directly (WELL_ID/UWI). Each rate value carries its own per-value OUOM column (the OSDU PDM stores units per measured value). Deliberate simplifications (ADR 0019): TEST_TYPE is the flat R_TEST_TYPE value column (carried like REPORTING_ENTITY_KIND); a test spans a single TEST_DATE; the dictionary's separate flow-measurement rows (PDEN_WELL_TEST / WELL_TEST_FLOW_MEAS), choke/pressure, run-number and audit columns are omitted. WKS analogue: work-product-component--FlowTest.

pden_alloc_factor._note: OSDU PDM PDEN_ALLOC_FACTOR (the PPDM-3.9 PDEN allocation-factor table the OSDU PDM inherits -- PPDM is lineage only, ADR 0010; OSDU's WKS-native analogue is RPEN_ALLOCATION_FACTOR): a from-entity -> to-entity allocation factor, NOT a stored allocated-volume table (PDEN_VOL_ALLOC is out of scope). Deliberate simplifications (ADR 0019): the typed source/target PDEN pointers are flattened to FROM_/TO_REPORTING_ENTITY_ID against our REPORTING_ENTITY grain (from = Field-kind group entity, to = Well-kind entity); ALLOCATION_FACTOR carries its own per-value OUOM ('fraction', dimensionless); activity-type/qualifier/method and audit columns are omitted.
